name: sap-abap-agent
description: Self-hosted marketplace for the SAP ABAP Agent Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: sap-abap-agent
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: 25 module consultants + 1 researcher + 1 daily learner (28 agents total) with auto-scoring routing engine, CDS KB, SAP Docs Research, ABAP cloud connect, code review, clean code & extensibility.
